meta.title: WordPing — Learn English Smarter
meta.description: A smart flashcard app with AI-powered meanings, beautiful themes, and daily reminders for serious English learners.

hero.title:
Master English,
one word at a time.
hero.subtitle: WordPing is a smart flashcard app with AI-powered meanings, beautiful themes, and daily reminders — built for serious learners.

flashcards.title: Smart Flashcards
flashcards.desc: Swipe through cards, flip to reveal meanings, and organize words into folders. Study at your own pace.

ai.title: AI-Powered Meanings
ai.desc: Get instant, context-aware definitions for any word — no manual lookup needed.

test.title: Test Modes
test.desc: Challenge yourself with Word Flip, Word Reorder, and Test mode to solidify your memory.

notifications.title: Daily Reminders
notifications.desc: Set custom push notifications so you never skip a study session. Small habits, big results.

themes.title: Beautiful Themes
themes.desc: Personalize your learning environment with premium skins — from Deep Sea to Sakura to Night City.

folders.title: Organize & Focus
folders.desc: Group your words into folders by topic, chapter, or difficulty. Stay organized, study smarter.

1.title: Add Your Words
1.desc: Save any word or phrase you want to learn. Add a meaning, a personal note, and organize them into folders.

2.title: Study Every Day
2.desc: Flip through your flashcards, take tests, and get reminded to study. Daily review is the fastest path to fluency.

3.title: Watch Yourself Improve
3.desc: As you master more words, your vocabulary grows. Track progress and see real results over time.

cta.title: Start learning today
cta.subtitle: Free to download. Premium themes available.

footer.tagline: Built for learners who mean it.
